title: Dry-Run Depth & Agent Self-Testing
requirements:
Full pipeline simulation without side effects. Golden-file tests for agent prompts.

1. Deep dry-run mode:
   - Update CLAUDE.md dry-run behavior to run full pipeline through secret scan
   - STOP before: PR creation, Jira status transitions, reviewer assignment, any gh command that creates/modifies PRs or issues
   - Write all artifacts to runs/{ticket_id}/ with dry_run: true flag in PRD.json
   - Update parse-args.sh: --dry-run sets dry_run: true in output
   - Update PR Agent invocation in CLAUDE.md: check dry_run flag, skip if true

2. Create scripts/dry-run-report.sh:
   - Args: <ticket_id>
   - Reads all artifacts from runs/{ticket_id}/
   - Generates human-readable summary: PRD.json task list + AC coverage, code changes diff summary per task, QA results, Critic verdict + issues, secret scan result, conflict resolution result, estimated PR size
   - Output: formatted text to stdout

3. Agent test fixtures directory:
   - Create tests/ directory structure: tests/fixtures/tickets/, tests/fixtures/repos/, tests/fixtures/expected/, tests/run-agent-test.sh
   - Create 3 fixture tickets: simple-feature.json (single-file Story), multi-task-bug.json (multi-file Bug with deps), cross-repo-story.json (multi-repo Story)

4. Agent test runner:
   - Create tests/run-agent-test.sh: Args: <fixture_name> or 'all'
   - For each fixture: run full pipeline in dry-run mode, compare PRD.json structure against expected, compare REVIEW.json structure against expected, validate all artifacts against schemas
   - Exit 0 if all pass, exit 1 if any fail

5. Script unit tests:
   - Create tests/test-scripts.sh: test each utility script in isolation (generate-branch-name.sh, validate-branch-name.sh, validate-commit-msg.sh, resolve-repo.sh, resolve-toolchain.sh, preflight.sh)
   - Uses assert helpers (compare expected vs actual JSON output)

6. Makefile integration:
   - Add targets: test (runs both), test-scripts, test-agents, test-agent (single fixture)

7. Write tests for all new functionality
acceptance_criteria: Dry-run mode runs full pipeline through secret scan without creating PRs or modifying Jira
dry_run: true flag is set in PRD.json during dry runs
scripts/dry-run-report.sh produces human-readable summary of all artifacts
tests/ directory structure exists with fixtures and test runners
3 fixture tickets exist: simple-feature, multi-task-bug, cross-repo-story
tests/test-scripts.sh tests utility scripts in isolation
Makefile has test, test-scripts, test-agents, test-agent targets
